name: Twitter API MCP Server (twitterapi.io)
what_it_does: MCP server using twitterapi.io as a Twitter/X API proxy. Enables AI agents to search tweets, get user profiles, read timelines, and access Twitter/X social data through twitterapi.io's simplified API — avoiding Twitter's expensive direct API tiers.
use_cases: Searching Twitter/X for mentions and hashtags from social listening agents
Monitoring Twitter conversations and trending topics for market research agents
Retrieving user timelines and profile data from social media analytics agents
Building Twitter-based content research workflows via AI agents
not_for: Tweeting or posting (twitterapi.io focuses on read access)
High-volume enterprise Twitter access (use Twitter API Enterprise directly)
LinkedIn, Facebook, or other social platforms (Twitter/X specific)
best_when: A researcher or marketer wants AI agents to search and analyze Twitter/X content without the cost and complexity of Twitter's official API tiers.
avoid_when: You need to post tweets, require guaranteed SLA, or need the full Twitter API feature set. twitterapi.io is a third-party proxy service.

auth.notes: twitterapi.io API key required. Register at twitterapi.io for access. Acts as proxy to Twitter/X API.

pricing.paid_tiers: twitterapi.io paid plans for higher request volumes
pricing.notes: twitterapi.io is a paid service with free trial. MCP server is free open source.

known_agent_gotchas: twitterapi.io is a third-party proxy — not affiliated with Twitter/X; proxy reliability depends on their service
Twitter/X API terms may restrict certain use cases even through proxy services — review ToS
Twitter API changes frequently — proxy services may lag in supporting new features
Community MCP server — not official twitterapi.io or Twitter product
agent_readiness.security_notes: Third-party proxy for Twitter data. Twitter data may include sensitive user information. Review twitterapi.io privacy practices. HTTPS.

security_score_components.security_notes: Third-party proxy. Twitter data passes through twitterapi.io — review privacy policy. HTTPS.
